an1.209:1.1: "This is the foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my *bhikkhu* disciples who are eager for training — namely, Rāhula.
an1.210:1.1: … Among those who went forth through faith — namely, Raṭṭhapāla.
an1.211:1.1: … Among those who are first to draw lots — namely, Kuṇḍadhāna.
an1.212:1.1: … Among those of inspired speech — namely, Vaṅgīsa.
an1.213:1.1: … Among those who are pleasing on all sides — namely, Upasena Vaṅgantaputta.
an1.214:1.1: … Among those who assign lodgings — namely, Dabba Mallaputta.
an1.215:1.1: … Among those who are dear and beloved to *devatās* — namely, Pilindavaccha.
an1.216:1.1: … Among those of swift direct knowledge — namely, Bāhiya Dārucīriya.
an1.217:1.1: … Among those who speak in diverse ways — namely, Kumārakassapa.
an1.218:1.1: … Among those who have attained analytical knowledge — namely, Mahākoṭṭhita."
